title: How do I add an external tool in a Canvas Module?
plain_text: Adding external tools in Canvas modules allows instructors to customize the module structure and functionality for their students. By incorporating these tools, you can enhance the learning experience, providing additional resources and features that align with your course objectives. Add external tools in a module 1. Select Modules from the course navigation menu. 2. Create a Module, then select the + icon. 3. Select 'External Tool' from the drop-down menu. 4. Select the external tool you would like to add. If there is a search icon for the tool you want to add, select it and follow the instructions that appear in a new window. 5. Check the box for 'Load in a new tab'. 6. Select 'Add Item'. 7. When you are ready for students to access the tool, publish the module and its items. Refer to How do I post content to Canvas Modules? for more details.
body_html:
Adding external tools in Canvas modules allows instructors to customize the module structure and functionality for their students. By incorporating these tools, you can enhance the learning experience, providing additional resources and features that align with your course objectives.

Add external tools in a module

  • Select Modules from the course navigation menu.
  • Create a Module, then select the + icon.
  • Select 'External Tool' from the drop-down menu.
  • Select the external tool you would like to add. If there is a search icon for the tool you want to add, select it and follow the instructions that appear in a new window.
  • Check the box for 'Load in a new tab'.
  • Select 'Add Item'.
  • When you are ready for students to access the tool, publish the module and its items. Refer to How do I post content to Canvas Modules? for more details.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Adding external tools in Canvas modules allows instructors to customize the module structure and functionality for their students. By incorporating these tools, you can enhance the learning experience, providing additional resources and features that align with your course objectives. Add external tools in a module 1. Select Modules from the course navigation menu. 2. Create a Module, then select the + icon. 3. Select 'External Tool' from the drop-down menu. 4. Select the external tool you would like to add. If there is a search icon for the tool you want to add, select it and follow the instructions that appear in a new window. 5. Check the box for 'Load in a new tab'. 6. Select 'Add Item'. 7. When you are ready for students to access the tool, publish the module and its items. Refer to How do I post content to Canvas Modules? for more details.

categories: Teaching and Learning Technology - Canvas - Getting Started
